hero.title: Turn Your Workspace Into an Instant Relief Station
hero.description: AI-powered ergonomic stretches designed for desk workers, demonstrated by real healthcare professionals. Relieve tension in under 3 minutes using just your chair and desk. No gym clothes. No sweating. Just instant, safe relief.
hero.trusted_by: Routines validated by clinical experts & loved by {count}+ US desk workers

watch_page.title: Office Relief Demo Video
watch_page.description: Watch our featured Office Relief demo video to see how AI-guided desk stretches turn an ordinary workspace into a fast, safe relief routine.

authority.title: Real Medical Experts. Real Everyday Clothes.
authority.description: Notice anything different about our videos? You won't see fitness models or tight yoga pants here. The people guiding your daily micro-breaks are practicing doctors, nurses, and rehabilitation specialists from the Nanning Zhuangyaofang Traditional Chinese Medicine Hospital. We asked our clinical team to ditch their scrubs and wear their everyday clothes to prove a point: you don't need activewear to relieve a stiff neck or a tight lower back.
authority.additional_text: Supported by the Guangxi Academy of Sciences' Big Health Industry Research Institute, our demonstrating partners bring over 30 years of clinical research and physical therapy expertise directly to your screen. They specialize in clinical rehabilitation for neck, shoulder, and lumbar pain—proving that true, medical-grade relief fits seamlessly into your normal workday.

image.alt: Medical professionals demonstrating stretches in everyday clothes

how-it-works.title: Feel Better in 3 Simple Steps
how-it-works.description: Our AI instantly analyzes your surroundings to build a safe, ergonomic stretching routine.

items.title: Step 1: Snap Your Space
items.description: Take a quick photo of your current setup—office, home, or couch.

items.title: Step 2: Pinpoint the Tension
items.description: Tell us where it hurts. Select your trouble zones like Stiff Neck or Lower Back.

items.title: Step 3: Get Your Micro-Break
items.description: Instantly receive a guided, 3-minute stretch routine using your exact objects.

benefits.title: Designed for the Reality of Your Workday

items.title: Work-Clothes Friendly
items.description: If our clinical specialists can demonstrate these movements in their casual clothes, you can do them in your office attire. No awkward poses, zero outfit changes.

items.title: Zero Sweating, 100% Clinical Efficacy
items.description: These aren't workouts. They are physical-therapy-inspired movements designed by rehabilitation experts to increase blood flow, soothe nerve tension, and align your spine—not raise your heart rate.

items.title: Built for Busy Schedules
items.description: Got a call in 5 minutes? Our routines range from 1 to 3 minutes, fitting perfectly between your Zoom meetings while delivering medical-grade relief.

testimonials.title: Real Relief for Real Desk Workers

items.name: David R.
items.quote: Sitting in front of code for 10 hours a day wrecked my posture. I use this app twice a day just using my desk chair. The neck tension is completely gone.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.quote: Finally, something that fits my schedule. I do a 2-minute shoulder release using my kitchen counter while working from home. Highly recommend!

items.name: Michael T.
items.quote: No more chiropractor visits! These quick stretches between meetings have saved my lower back. Simple, effective, and professional.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about OfficeReliefAI

items.question: Who are the people demonstrating the stretches in the videos?
items.answer: They are actual healthcare professionals! We partnered with doctors and rehabilitation experts to demonstrate every single movement. We specifically asked them to wear casual, everyday clothing to show just how easy it is to integrate safe, clinically-backed relief into your normal routine without needing gym clothes.

items.question: Are these routines safe for people who sit all day?
items.answer: Absolutely. The routines are curated from authoritative health organizations and executed by clinical staff who specialize in joint mobility and posture correction. Every stretch is designed to safely counteract the specific physical toll of prolonged sitting.

items.question: Will these exercises make me sweat?
items.answer: No. Our platform focuses on relief and mobility. You can do these comfortably in your regular work attire.

items.question: What if I'm in an open office and don't want to look silly?
items.answer: We've got you covered. Select "Discreet Stretches" and the AI will generate subtle movements you can do without drawing attention.

items.question: How long does each routine take?
items.answer: Our routines range from 1 to 3 minutes, designed to fit perfectly between your meetings and tasks.

items.question: Do I need any special equipment?
items.answer: No equipment needed. Just your desk, chair, and the space around you. The AI creates stretches using what you already have.

items.question: What if generation fails?
items.answer: If your video fails to generate due to a technical issue, you will not lose any credits. We automatically refund your credits, and you can try again immediately.

vision-scenes.label: The 3-Act Visual Narrative
vision-scenes.title: Every Video Tells a Sacred Story in 3 Scenes
vision-scenes.description: Our AI crafts each video as a cinematic journey through three divinely inspired moments — presence, comfort, and promise.

items.title: Scene 1: Divine Presence
items.subtitle: God draws near, but has not yet appeared.
items.description: The opening scene sets the atmosphere of sacred anticipation. Soft light breaks through clouds, a cross stands silhouetted against the dawn, and scripture pages flutter in a gentle breeze. You feel something holy approaching.

items.title: Scene 2: God's Comfort
items.subtitle: God is with you, and comforts you.
items.description: The heart of the story — God's presence is now felt. Warm light envelops the scene, hands reach out in compassion, and divine sparkles illuminate the darkness. This is the moment of encounter and embrace.

items.title: Scene 3: Promise & Peace
items.subtitle: God has answered. You are no longer alone.
items.description: The final scene brings resolution and hope. The sun rises fully over calm waters, mountains stand firm in the distance, and you see yourself renewed — standing in the fullness of God's promise.

founder-story.title: A Note from the Founder: Why I Built "Fear Not"
paragraphs: For as long as I can remember, I lived in the shadow of fear.

As a child, it was the fear of a bad grade or a teacher's frown. As a young man, it was the crushing anxiety of not being "good enough" to survive in a competitive world. When I started my own business, the fear only grew — sleepless nights wondering if I could sustain what I had built.

Even now, in my 50s, I realize that fear doesn't care about your age or your title. I've looked into the eyes of doctors, farmers, workers, and leaders, and I've seen the same reflection: a quiet, persistent fear of the unknown.

I built this platform because I realized we all need more than just a quote — we need to hear a Promise that is meant specifically for us. When I first truly felt the weight of Isaiah 41:10 — "Fear not, for I am with you" — it changed how I breathed.

"Fear Not" is my way of sharing that peace with you. We use technology not just to make videos, but to bridge the gap between your personal struggle and God's timeless comfort. Whatever storm you are walking through, I want you to hear His voice, speaking directly to your heart, telling you that you are not alone.
I've been there. I understand. And I promise, there is peace on the other side.

items.quote: Breathtaking! I listen to this during my morning devotionals. It brings me so much peace before the day starts.
It perfectly captured my struggle and God's answer. I wept when I watched it. Truly a blessing.
I was going through a really dark time after losing my job. This video with Psalm 23 came at the perfect moment. I watch it every morning now. Thank you for this beautiful ministry.
My grandmother is in a nursing home and can't read anymore. I sent her a video with her favorite verse, Philippians 4:13. She cried tears of joy. This is truly a gift from God.
As a busy mom of three, I rarely have time for Bible study. These 2-minute videos are exactly what I needed. The AI-generated images are stunning and really help me visualize the scriptures.
I struggle with anxiety and panic attacks. Having these personalized videos with calming visuals and God's Word has become part of my daily coping routine. The voice is so peaceful.
I created a video for my husband who was deployed overseas. He said watching it before bed helped him feel connected to home and to God. This technology is a blessing for military families!
I was skeptical at first - AI and religion? But the way it combines my personal prayer request with relevant scripture... it's genuinely moving. I've shared this with my entire church group.
My teenage daughter has been questioning her faith. I made a video for her with Jeremiah 29:11 and she actually watched it three times. It opened up a conversation we'd been avoiding. Thank you!
After my wife passed away, I felt so alone. The video you created with Isaiah 41:10... I felt like God was speaking directly to me. I've bookmarked it and watch it whenever grief overwhelms me.

I'm a hospice nurse and I've been sharing these videos with my patients and their families. The peace it brings during those final moments is incredible. This ministry is literally touching lives at the end of life.

I battle depression and some days getting out of bed is hard. I made a video with Psalm 42:11 and set it as my alarm. Starting the day with God's Word in such a beautiful format has changed my mornings.

I sent this to my sister who was diagnosed with breast cancer. She told me it's the most meaningful gift she's received. The combination of scripture and visuals is more powerful than just reading the Bible alone.

As someone who learns visually, reading the Bible has always been challenging for me. These videos bring the stories to life. I finally feel like I truly understand the Psalms I've read a hundred times before.

seo.title: What This Site Helps You Do
paragraphs: Fear Not helps people turn prayer requests, personal memories, and Bible verses into comforting videos centered on faith. The site is designed for visitors who want to create a meaningful video for themselves, a loved one, or a church community.

The homepage explains how the process works, shows examples of the visual style, and introduces the kinds of spiritual encouragement these videos are meant to offer. Visitors can explore testimonials, frequently asked questions, and sample scenes before starting their own project.

Together, these sections give search engines and human visitors a clearer understanding of the platform, the kinds of videos it creates, and the reasons someone may choose to use it during seasons of fear, grief, healing, or hope.
